sentences.target: Je regarde mon poids chaque semaine.

translations.fr: Je regarde mon poids chaque semaine.
translations.en: I check my weight every week.
translations.vi: Tôi kiểm tra cân nặng mỗi tuần.
translations.hi: मैं हर हफ्ते अपना वज़न जाँचता हूँ।
translations.id: Saya menimbang berat badan setiap minggu.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular) functioning as the subject of the clause.
Main verb in the present indicative (1st person singular), taking a direct object.
Possessive determiner (masc. sg.) modifying 'poids'.
Common noun (masc.) functioning as the direct object of 'regarde'.
Determiner of universal quantification modifying 'semaine' to form a temporal adjunct.
Common noun (fem.) head of the NP 'chaque semaine', an adverbial time expression.

sentences.target: Ce poids me semble trop lourd.

translations.fr: Ce poids me semble trop lourd.
translations.en: This weight seems too heavy to me.
translations.es: Este peso me parece demasiado pesado.
translations.de: Dieses Gewicht kommt mir zu schwer vor.
translations.it: Questo peso mi sembra troppo pesante.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个重量对我来说太重了。
translations.yue: 呢個重量對我嚟講太重。
translations.ru: Этот вес кажется мне слишком тяжёлым.
translations.pt: Este peso me parece pesado demais.
translations.he: המשקל הזה נראה לי כבד מדי.
translations.tr: Bu ağırlık bana çok ağır geliyor.
translations.vi: Trọng lượng này có vẻ quá nặng đối với tôi.
translations.ar: هذا الوزن يبدو لي ثقيلاً جداً.
translations.nl: Dit gewicht lijkt me te zwaar.
translations.uk: Ця вага здається мені надто важкою.
translations.hu: Ez a súly nekem túl nehéznek tűnik.
translations.hi: यह वजन मुझे बहुत भारी लगता है।
translations.pl: Ta waga wydaje mi się zbyt ciężka.
translations.el: Αυτό το βάρος μου φαίνεται πολύ βαρύ.
translations.nb: Denne vekten virker for tung for meg.
translations.id: Bobot ini terasa terlalu berat bagi saya.
translations.sv: Den här vikten verkar för tung för mig.
translations.ro: Această greutate mi se pare prea grea.
translations.cs: Tato váha se mi zdá příliš těžká.
translations.da: Denne vægt virker for tung for mig.
translations.fi: Tämä paino tuntuu minusta liian painavalta.
translations.ja: この重さは私には重すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying 'poids'.
Common noun (masc.) functioning as the subject of 'semble'.
Clitic personal pronoun (1st person, dative) marking the experiencer with 'sembler'.
Main verb in the present indicative (3rd person singular) taking a complement predicate.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'lourd'.
Predicate adjective serving as the complement of 'sembler'.

sentences.target: Il faut souvent surveiller ton poids.

translations.fr: Il faut souvent surveiller ton poids.
translations.en: You need to watch your weight often.
translations.es: Debes vigilar tu peso a menudo.
translations.de: Du solltest dein Gewicht oft kontrollieren.
translations.it: Devi controllare spesso il tuo peso.
translations.zh-Hans: 你需要经常关注你的体重。
translations.yue: 你要經常留意你嘅體重。
translations.ru: Тебе нужно часто следить за своим весом.
translations.pt: Você precisa vigiar seu peso com frequência.
translations.he: אתה צריך לעקוב לעיתים קרובות אחר המשקל שלך.
translations.tr: Kilonu sık sık takip etmen gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Bạn cần thường xuyên theo dõi cân nặng của mình.
translations.ar: يجب عليك مراقبة وزنك بشكل متكرر.
translations.nl: Je moet je gewicht vaak in de gaten houden.
translations.uk: Тобі потрібно часто стежити за своєю вагою.
translations.hi: तुम्हें अक्सर अपने वज़न पर नज़र रखनी चाहिए।
translations.el: Πρέπει συχνά να παρακολουθείς το βάρος σου.
translations.nb: Du må ofte følge med på vekten din.
translations.id: Kamu perlu sering memantau berat badanmu.
translations.sv: Du behöver ofta hålla koll på din vikt.
translations.ro: Trebuie să îți urmărești des greutatea.
translations.da: Du skal ofte holde øje med din vægt.
translations.ja: 体重はこまめに注意する必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/expletive pronoun used with 'falloir'.
Impersonal verb (present, 3rd singular) introducing an infinitival complement.
Adverb of frequency modifying the predicate (the necessity/infinitive action).
Infinitive verb complement of 'faut'.
Possessive determiner (masc. sg.) modifying 'poids'.
Common noun (masc.) functioning as the direct object of 'surveiller'.

sentences.target: On note le poids du sac.

translations.fr: On note le poids du sac.
translations.es: Registramos el peso de la maleta.
translations.de: Wir notieren das Gewicht des Koffers.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ghi lại trọng lượng của hành lý.
translations.nl: We noteren het gewicht van de koffer.
translations.hi: हम बैग का वज़न दर्ज करते हैं।
translations.ja: スーツケースの重さを記録します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun serving as the subject (3rd person singular agreement).
Main verb in the present indicative (3rd person singular).
Definite article (masc. sg.) introducing 'poids'.
Common noun (masc.) functioning as the direct object of 'note'.
Contraction of the preposition 'de' + definite article 'le'; introduces a noun complement ('du sac').
Common noun (masc.) complement of the preposition 'du' (complement of the noun 'poids').

Ce poids me semble trop lourd.
Il faut souvent surveiller ton poids.
On note le poids du sac.

Ce poids me semble trop lourd.
Il faut souvent surveiller ton poids.
On note le poids du sac.
en: I check my weight every week.
This weight seems too heavy to me.
You need to watch your weight often.
